Three eligible main papers were cataloged: MarS, Operator Deep Smoothing for Implied Volatility, and An Online Learning Theory of Trading-Volume Maximization. Main remains partial rather than complete because this was not a full abstract-level adjudication of every accepted paper; workshop, affinity, Tiny Papers, and Blog Posts rosters remain pending.

3 verified papers curated for direct relevance to quantitative finance and asset management. Tracks are separated so main-conference, workshop, position, and affinity status remains visible.

## Main Conference (3)

### [An Online Learning Theory of Trading-Volume Maximization](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/2e809adc337594e0fee330a64acbb982-Paper-Conference.pdf>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-iclr-cesari-online-learning-trading-volume

**Authors:** Tommaso Cesari, Roberto Colomboni

**Venue / year:** ICLR · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-13

**Topics:** Market Microstructure · Execution

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Tasks:** brokerage price learning · trading-volume maximization

**Focus:** Studies how an online broker should set prices between two traders to maximize the number of mutually beneficial asset exchanges.

**Why it matters:** Gives regret guarantees for a microstructure-style execution objective where the broker observes trader responses rather than complete valuations.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/2e809adc337594e0fee330a64acbb982-Abstract-Conference.html>) · [Paper](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/2e809adc337594e0fee330a64acbb982-Paper-Conference.pdf>)

---

### [MarS: a Financial Market Simulation Engine Powered by Generative Foundation Model](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/6261d3bc9e9326ddff055595aabd54e1-Paper-Conference.pdf>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-iclr-li-mars-financial-market-simulation

**Authors:** Junjie Li, Yang Liu, Weiqing Liu, Shikai Fang, Lewen Wang, Chang XU, Jiang Bian

**Venue / year:** ICLR · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-13

**Topics:** Market Simulation · Synthetic Data · Market Microstructure · Financial Agents

**Assets / frequency:** Tick

**Tasks:** order-level market simulation · market-impact analysis · trading-agent training

**Focus:** Builds an order-level generative foundation model and simulation engine for realistic, controllable financial-market trajectories.

**Why it matters:** Turns limit-order-book style data into a simulator for forecasting, risk detection, market-impact analysis, and trading-agent training.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/6261d3bc9e9326ddff055595aabd54e1-Abstract-Conference.html>) · [Paper](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/6261d3bc9e9326ddff055595aabd54e1-Paper-Conference.pdf>) · [Code](<https://github.com/microsoft/MarS/>)

---

### [Operator Deep Smoothing for Implied Volatility](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/f115f619b62833aadc5acb058975b0e6-Paper-Conference.pdf>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-iclr-wiedemann-operator-deep-smoothing

**Authors:** Ruben Wiedemann, Antoine (Jack) Jacquier, Lukas Gonon

**Venue / year:** ICLR · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-13

**Topics:** Derivatives · Risk Management · Market Microstructure

**Assets / frequency:** Derivatives · Intraday

**Tasks:** implied-volatility smoothing · option-surface nowcasting

**Focus:** Uses graph neural operators to map irregular option quotes into no-arbitrage-aware implied-volatility surfaces on intraday S&amp;P 500 options data.

**Why it matters:** Replaces repeated hand-calibrated option-surface fitting with a single learned operator for faster valuation, hedging, and risk workflows.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/f115f619b62833aadc5acb058975b0e6-Abstract-Conference.html>) · [Paper](<https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/f115f619b62833aadc5acb058975b0e6-Paper-Conference.pdf>) · [Code](<https://github.com/rwicl/operator-deep-smoothing-for-implied-volatility>)
